title: Watch: Choi Min Sik Makes Choi Hyun Wook A Tempting Offer In “Notes From The Last Row” Teaser
content:
Netflix’s “Notes from the Last Row” has shared a new preview video ahead of its premiere! Based on the Spanish play of the same name, “Notes from the Last Row” is a psychological thriller that follows Heo Mun Oh (Choi Min Sik), a failed writer-turned-Korean literature professor who hasn’t published a new work in 20… Continue reading Watch: Choi Min Sik Makes Choi Hyun Wook A Tempting Offer In “Notes From The Last Row” Teaser
The post Watch: Choi Min Sik Makes Choi Hyun Wook A Tempting Offer In “Notes From The Last Row” Teaser appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 崔岷植向崔显旭提出诱人提议，《最后一排的笔记》预告公开
facts_list: Netflix剧集《最后一排的笔记》发布新预告视频
该剧改编自同名西班牙话剧，是一部心理惊悚片
崔岷植饰演许文五，一位20年未出版新作的失败作家兼韩国文学教授
崔显旭在预告中收到崔岷植的诱人提议
summary_zh: Netflix心理惊悚剧《最后一排的笔记》发布新预告，崔岷植饰演的许文五向崔显旭饰演的角色提出诱人提议。该剧改编自西班牙话剧，讲述一位20年未出版新作的失败作家兼韩国文学教授的故事。

title: Ko Kyu Phil And Amin Expecting Their First Child
content:
Ko Kyu Phil and Amin are going to be parents! Earlier on June 18, Amin took to Instagram to share her growing baby bump along with a photo caption revealing that she is 15 weeks pregnant. She also shared a photo posing in front of the “MOM & BABY EXPO.” The following day on June… Continue reading Ko Kyu Phil And Amin Expecting Their First Child
The post Ko Kyu Phil And Amin Expecting Their First Child appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 高圭弼与Amin宣布怀孕，Amin晒孕肚照
facts_list: 6月18日，Amin在Instagram上分享孕肚照，透露已怀孕15周
Amin在“MOM & BABY EXPO”展板前拍照
summary_zh: 高圭弼与Amin即将迎来第一个孩子。6月18日，Amin在Instagram上分享孕肚照，透露已怀孕15周，并附上在“MOM & BABY EXPO”展板前的照片。
